ValidationRule.description: You cannot use 7,7%, 2,5%, 3,7% or 8% as VAT from 01.01.2024 on. Please use instead 8,1%, 2,6%, 3,8% or respectively 9%
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ISCHANGED( VATPercent__c ) && FinanceDate__c > DATE(2024,01,01) && ( ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c, "7.7%") || ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c, "2.5%") || ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c, "3.7%") || ISPICKVAL(VATPercent__c, "8%") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot use 7,7%, 2,5%, 3,7% or 8% as VAT from 01.01.2024 on. Please use instead 8,1%, 2,6%, 3,8% or respectively 9%. (IN028)
